message:
feat(groupby): add complete aggregation semantics (mean, count, min, max, first, last)

Adds AggFunc enum and generic groupby_agg() dispatcher alongside the
existing optimized groupby_sum path. Includes 13 new tests covering all
aggregation functions, null handling, and first-seen key ordering.

Closes: bd-2gi.16

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
